qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated API Information Disclosure in Traefik v1.7
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unauthenticated HTTP API configuration disclosure in api/handler.go, not HTTP/3 TLS client authentication or crypto/tls session resumption.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: REST Provider Configuration Injection in Traefik v1.7
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns missing authorization on PUT /api/providers/{provider} in provider/rest/rest.go, not HTTP/3 TLS client certificate verification or session resumption.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Slowloris DoS via Missing ReadHeaderTimeout
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns HTTP/1.x header read timeout resource exhaustion in server/server.go, not HTTP/3 TLS client-auth bypass or crypto/tls resumed-handshake certificate validation.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: TLS client authentication bypass on HTTP/3, tied to crypto/tls session resumption accepting a resumed handshake after ClientCAs or RootCAs changes. The final qualifying findings instead cover v1.7 HTTP API disclosure, REST provider configuration injection, and HTTP Slowloris DoS.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-gv8r-9rw9-9697 summary: Traefik affected by TLS ClientAuth Bypass on HTTP/3.
NVD CVE-2025-68121 description: crypto/tls session resumption may succeed incorrectly when ClientCAs or RootCAs are mutated between initial and resumed handshakes.
Traefik v3.6.8 release notes list CVE-2025-68121 and an HTTP/3 quic-go update among fixes.
api-info-disclosure reports api/handler.go unauthenticated GET endpoints; it contains no HTTP/3, QUIC, TLS client certificate, ClientCAs, RootCAs, or session-resumption path.
rest-provider-injection reports provider/rest/rest.go unauthenticated PUT configuration updates; it contains no HTTP/3, QUIC, TLS client certificate, ClientCAs, RootCAs, or session-resumption path.
slowloris-dos reports server/server.go missing ReadHeaderTimeout for HTTP header reads; it contains no HTTP/3, QUIC, TLS client certificate, ClientCAs, RootCAs, or session-resumption path.
